purpose: Opt-in report-only contract for a single, controlled TLS-removal intervention against the standalone forge __tls_get_addr@GLIBC_2.3 blocker. Compares (1) the baseline standalone forge artifact, (2) the existing local-exec TLS model probe, and (3) a proposed owned-tls-cache source-surface intervention that replaces the largest thread_local! cluster (`abi_unistd_reentrant_buffers_and_lookup_state`, 25 macros at crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs) with a `pthread_setspecific`/`pthread_getspecific` keyed cache. The contract pins the disposition of every TLS source surface across the three lanes so a future live experiment cannot over-claim removal: a row may move from `still_thread_local` to `pthread_key_substituted` only when the build_status is `pass` AND nm/readelf confirm `__tls_get_addr` is no longer undefined. Until every required cluster exits, replacement_level_change_allowed=false and the lane stays report-only. Default forge behavior is never affected by this manifest.

tls_symbol_disposition_rows.removal_strategy: Replace `thread_local!` macros in target source surfaces with a process-keyed pthread_setspecific/pthread_getspecific cache; the resulting binary contains no general-dynamic TLS relocations and therefore no __tls_get_addr undefined symbol.

owner_surface_disposition_rows.removal_plan: Migrate all 25 `thread_local!` declarations to a single `frankenlibc_abi_unistd_tls` pthread key; allocate the per-thread cache on first access, free in a registered destructor.
Migrate the resolver h_errno + lookup state cluster to a `frankenlibc_abi_resolv_tls` pthread key; preserve resolver(3) reentrancy semantics.
Migrate RPC scratch buffers to a `frankenlibc_abi_rpc_tls` pthread key.
Migrate glibc-internal shims to a `frankenlibc_abi_glibc_internal_tls` pthread key; verify behavior of `__libc_thread_freeres`-style hooks.
Migrate string membrane recursion guards to a `frankenlibc_abi_string_tls` pthread key; preserve recursion-into-self detection semantics.

live_experiment_environment_blockers.blocker: owned-tls-cache feature gate plus the unistd crypt/crypt_gensalt, NIS helper, resolver backend-file cache, resolver nameserver, resolver h_errno, getmntent, getpass, cuserid, C++ EH globals, gethostbyname2 scratch state, fgetspent shadow entry state, RPC rpcent state, utmp-state, pututxline return-buffer, NSS systemd block-flag, services/networks/protocols/hosts/aliases/netgroup iterators, fstab-state, ttyent-state, getdate-tm, string ABI recursion/scratch state, and RPC ABI scratch/state slices are wired, but the substitute is not complete across every tracked source surface.
live_experiment_environment_blockers.remediation: Continue migrating the remaining 14 `thread_local!` macros across the 5 owner-surface rows to owned process-keyed cache primitives. Until every required cluster exits and nm/readelf prove `__tls_get_addr` absent, the owned-tls-cache lane MUST stay report-only with build_status_until_owned_substitute_complete=report_only_blocked.

summary.owned_tls_cache_current_slice: crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs crypt/crypt_gensalt, NIS helper, resolver nameserver, getmntent, getpass, cuserid, C++ EH globals, gethostbyname2 scratch state, fgetspent shadow entry state, RPC rpcent state, utmp-state, pututxline return buffers, NSS systemd block flag, fstab state, ttyent state, getdate tm, services iterator state, networks iterator state, protocols iterator state, hosts iterator state, netgroup iterator state, and alias iterator state; crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/resolv_abi.rs resolver backend-file caches and resolver h_errno state; crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/string_abi.rs string membrane recursion depth, strtok save pointer, strerror buffer, and strsignal buffer; crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/rpc_abi.rs xdr_reference recursion depth, clnt_sperrno buffer, clnt_spcreateerror buffer, rpc_createerr, svc_fdset, svc_max_pollfd, and svc_pollfd state
summary.next_safe_action: Land the owned-tls-cache feature gate + pthread-key substitute crate, then re-run the experiment lane and update each cluster's owned_tls_cache_disposition to `pthread_key_substituted` atomically with source_commit. Promotion remains forbidden until __tls_get_addr is absent from nm -D output AND every owner-surface cluster reports owned_tls_cache_disposition=pthread_key_substituted.
